case_title: ZHEN GUANG LIM VS. JUSTIN TIN DR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZHEN GUARD LIM IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT DR. JUSTIN TIN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY WITNESS ANTHONY TIN, OPERATIONS MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1190 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 19TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE PAYMENT IS FRUSTRATED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. SETTLED. PLAINTIFF ZHEN GUANG LIM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN TIN, DR. REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY TIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHOWS PROOF OF PAYMENT TO THE COURT. (COPY OF WRITTEN CHECK TO PLAINTIFF FOR THE AMOUNT OF $1,190.00) JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIM, ZHEN GUANG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED JAN-16-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TIN DR, JUSTIN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY LIM, ZHEN GUANG AS TO DEFENDANT TIN DR, JUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
